Class MurderEnvelope

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.cards.MurderEnvelope
public class MurderEnvelope extends Object
Represents the murder envelope containing the solution to the crime. Holds exactly one suspect, one weapon and one room card.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

      public MurderEnvelope()
      Constructs an empty murder envelope.

  • Method Details

    • seal

      public void seal(SuspectCard suspect, WeaponCard weapon, RoomCard room)
      Seals the envelope with the three solution cards.
      Parameters:
      suspect - the murderer
      weapon - the weapon used
      room - the room the crime was committed in

    • verify

      public boolean verify(SuspectCard suspect, WeaponCard weapon, RoomCard room)
      Checks whether a given accusation matches the envelope contents.
      Parameters:
      suspect - the accused suspect
      weapon - the accused weapon
      room - the accused room
      Returns:
      true if all three match, false otherwise

    • getSuspect

      public SuspectCard getSuspect()

    • getWeapon

      public WeaponCard getWeapon()

      public RoomCard getRoom()

    • isSealed

      public boolean isSealed()
      Returns true if the envelope has been sealed.
      Returns:
      true if sealed
